ddls:
CREATE TABLE "features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "visits" INTEGER /* Number of visits to the feature */,
  "accuracy_reward" INTEGER /* Accuracy reward associated with the feature */,
  "q_value" REAL /* Q-value indicating the performance of the feature */,
  "normalized_value" TEXT /* Normalized value representing the feature's performance relative to others */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color code for visual identification of the feature */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the feature */,
  "parent_feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent feature */,
  "owner_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team responsible for the feature */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the feature was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the feature was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the feature (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_features_parent_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feature_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feature_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage event */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature being used */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user using the feature */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date when the feature was used */,
  "usage_type" TEXT /* Type of usage (e.g., view, interaction) */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* ID of the user session */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the usage event in seconds */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the usage event was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_usage_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_usage_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., tester, developer, admin) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feature_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature this version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the feature */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Brief description of changes made in the version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_versions_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_versions_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feature_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature being tracked */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment where the performance metric was recorded (e.g., production, staging) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who recorded the performance metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the performance metric was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_performance_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_performance_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feature_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature this permission applies to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role required to access the feature */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the permission was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the permission */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_permissions_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_permissions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_permissions_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feature_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary feature */,
  "related_feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related feature */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., dependency, related) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the relationship */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the relationship */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_relationships_related_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("related_feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_relationships_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_relationships_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_relationships_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feature_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature this metadata belongs to */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key for the metadata */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value for the metadata */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the metadata */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the metadata was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the metadata */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the metadata was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_metadata_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_metadata_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_metadata_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
